description_long: This is a classic military-style hand grenade, specifically resembling the M67 fragmentation grenade. It features a spherical olive-green metal body with a visible seam running horizontally around its circumference. The top section is fitted with a metallic safety lever and a prominent pull ring attached to a safety pin, both rendered in a brass or gold color. Stenciled yellow text is visible on the body, indicating its type and specifications. The surface of the grenade is smooth and slightly glossy, with the lever and pin assembly providing functional interaction points. The overall design is compact and robust, intended for handheld use.
description: A spherical olive-green hand grenade with a brass safety lever and pull ring, featuring yellow stenciled text and a smooth, glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the yellow stenciled text, the full safety lever, and the pull ring clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the width of the safety lever and the roundness of the grenade body, with minimal text visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the safety lever and the smooth, uninterrupted surface of the grenade body.
description_view_3: Angled view showing the top of the grenade, the attachment of the lever, and a partial view of the stenciled text.
attribute_detonation_mechanism: Detonation is initiated by pulling the safety pin and releasing the safety lever, which triggers an internal timed fuse.
